TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pakelang (Kuwaping a sowal : 漁撈祭 ) Ira ko ci ramoday, cipadesay ato kaacangan a romi'ad, mimingay a demak mato pararamod to kapah ato kaying ato mipafahfah to adaday a pisalisin no cikawasay a demak, o tata'akay a demak i, mato paherek patireng to loma', caay kaeca ira ko pakelang sanay a demak no Pangcah, deng itini i Fata'an a sa'etal ato Tafalong, onini kalipahakan a mifotingay a demak i , mili'alac han nangra, ci mapatayay ato cipadesay a demak, malepon ko demak, o pakelang han nangra, onini tosaay a demak todongay malepon to demak awaay to ko lisin sanay, o no laday to ko 'orip. Orasaka, o pakelang mifoting hananay a demak i, o pipafahfah to tati'ihay i tatirengan a lisin koni, onian koya masaromaay a pinangan no Pangcah. No mifoting sato, deng o foting ko aalaen caay ka saan, i nanomay makaenay ho mangaay to maala, to laday anca o roma ko lisin no mawmahay, maaherek to ko pisalisin to masofoc, pararamod, mitadem, mangaay to pakelang a mifoting, oninian a demak i, deng o fa'inayan ko mamikapot, o fafahiyan itira to i loma' mihalaka to kakaenen. Ono niyaro' to a pisalisin, misakapoloongan to ko pifoting, mato miladis ko Sa'amisan a 'etal a finacadan, no pasawali i misacepo', no Falangaw i mikesi', no Siwkolan i mikomoris, onini a demak i, o pidoedo tona Siwkolang a taholican a mapatalahekal koni mifotingay a lisin no serangawan a demak. O pakelang hananay i, malecaday ato li'alac ko tatodong no pakelang, Nikawrira, o saki no mapatayay ko pakelang hananay. Ano maherek ko pitadem i, mipakelang to sapalafi to mato'asay no malininaay ato paro no loma' a mihinom to rarom no faloco' no malininaay a ma^min. saka, o herek no pitadem to mapatayay i, caay ka ^ca o mamipakelang a tala 'alo ano ^ca i riyar a mifoting to sapakalafi to mato'asay no ngangasawan ato iraay a mihayomay a tamdaw. O mahaenay ko tatodong no mipakelang hananay. Pi'arawan to lakaw 李景崇,1998," .
S.PHON: pakəɾaŋ (ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ : *** ) ira ko~u ʦi ramo~uɬ~ɮaj, ʦipaɬ~ɮəsaj ato~u kaaʦaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mimiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak mato~u pararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kapaħ ato~u kajiŋ ato~u mipafaħfaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a pisaɾisin no~u ʦikawasaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tataʡakaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i, mato~u paħərək patirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ, ʦaaj kaəʦa ira ko~u pakəɾaŋ sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u paŋʦaħ, ɬ~ɮəŋ itini i fataʡan a saʡətaɾ ato~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~unini kaɾipaħakan a mifo~utiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i , miɾiʡaɾaʦ ħan naŋra, ʦi mapatajaj ato~u ʦipaɬ~ɮəsaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾəpo~un ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u pakəɾaŋ ħan naŋra, o~unini to~usaaj a ɬ~ɮəmak to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾəpo~un to~u ɬ~ɮəmak awaaj to~u ko~u ɾisin sanaj, o~u no~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u ʡo~urip. o~urasaka, o~u pakəɾaŋ mifo~utiŋ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i, o~u pipafaħfaħ to~u tatiʡiħaj i tatirəŋan a ɾisin ko~uni, o~unian ko~uja masaro~umaaj a pinaŋan no~u paŋʦaħ. no~u mifo~utiŋ sato~u, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u fo~utiŋ ko~u aaɾaən ʦaaj ka saan, i nano~umaj makaənaj ħo~u maŋaaj to~u maaɾa, to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj anʦa o~u ro~uma ko~u ɾisin no~u mawmaħaj, maaħərək to~u ko~u pisaɾisin to~u maso~ufo~uʦ, pararamo~uɬ~ɮ, mitaɬ~ɮəm, maŋaaj to~u pakəɾaŋ a mifo~utiŋ, o~uninian a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u faʡinajan ko~u mamikapo~ut, o~u fafaħijan itira to~u i ɾo~umaʡ miħaɾaka to~u kakaənən. o~uno~u nijaro~uʡ to~u a pisaɾisin, misakapo~uɾo~uo~uŋan to~u ko~u pifo~utiŋ, mato~u miɾaɬ~ɮis ko~u saʡamisan a ʡətaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, no~u pasawaɾi i misaʦəpo~uʡ, no~u faɾaŋaw i mikəsiʡ, no~u siwko~uɾan i miko~umo~uris, o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, o~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~una siwko~uɾaŋ a taħo~uɾiʦan a mapataɾaħəkaɾ ko~uni mifo~utiŋaj a ɾisin no~u səraŋawan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u pakəɾaŋ ħananaj i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ato~u ɾiʡaɾaʦ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pakəɾaŋ, nikawrira, o~u saki no~u mapatajaj ko~u pakəɾaŋ ħananaj. ano~u maħərək ko~u pitaɬ~ɮəm i, mipakəɾaŋ to~u sapaɾafi to~u mato~uʡasaj no~u maɾininaaj ato~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a miħino~um to~u raro~um no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u maɾininaaj a maʔmin. saka, o~u ħərək no~u pitaɬ~ɮəm to~u mapatajaj i, ʦaaj ka ʔʦa o~u mamipakəɾaŋ a taɾa ʡaɾo~u ano~u ʔʦa i rijar a mifo~utiŋ to~u sapakaɾafi to~u mato~uʡasaj no~u ŋaŋasawan ato~u iraaj a miħajo~umaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u maħaənaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u mipakəɾaŋ ħananaj. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****," .
S.FORM: Pakelang (Kuwaping a sowal : 漁撈祭 ) Ira ko ci ramoday, cipadesay ato kaacangan a romi'ad, mimingay a demak mato pararamod to kapah ato kaying ato mipafahfah to adaday a pisalisin no cikawasay a demak, o tata'akay a demak i, mato paherek patireng to loma', caay kaeca ira ko pakelang sanay a demak no Pangcah, deng itini i Fata'an a sa'etal ato Tafalong, onini kalipahakan a mifotingay a demak i , mili'alac han nangra, ci mapatayay ato cipadesay a demak, malepon ko demak, o pakelang han nangra, onini tosaay a demak todongay malepon to demak awaay to ko lisin sanay, o no laday to ko 'orip. Orasaka, o pakelang mifoting hananay a demak i, o pipafahfah to tati'ihay i tatirengan a lisin koni, onian koya masaromaay a pinangan no Pangcah. No mifoting sato, deng o foting ko aalaen caay ka saan, i nanomay makaenay ho mangaay to maala, to laday anca o roma ko lisin no mawmahay, maaherek to ko pisalisin to masofoc, pararamod, mitadem, mangaay to pakelang a mifoting, oninian a demak i, deng o fa'inayan ko mamikapot, o fafahiyan itira to i loma' mihalaka to kakaenen. Ono niyaro' to a pisalisin, misakapoloongan to ko pifoting, mato miladis ko Sa'amisan a 'etal a finacadan, no pasawali i misacepo', no Falangaw i mikesi', no Siwkolan i mikomoris, onini a demak i, o pidoedo tona Siwkolang a taholican a mapatalahekal koni mifotingay a lisin no serangawan a demak. O pakelang hananay i, malecaday ato li'alac ko tatodong no pakelang, Nikawrira, o saki no mapatayay ko pakelang hananay. Ano maherek ko pitadem i, mipakelang to sapalafi to mato'asay no malininaay ato paro no loma' a mihinom to rarom no faloco' no malininaay a ma^min. saka, o herek no pitadem to mapatayay i, caay ka ^ca o mamipakelang a tala 'alo ano ^ca i riyar a mifoting to sapakalafi to mato'asay no ngangasawan ato iraay a mihayomay a tamdaw. O mahaenay ko tatodong no mipakelang hananay. Pi'arawan to lakaw 李景崇,1998," .
S.PHON: pakəɾaŋ (ko~u~uwapiŋ a so~uwaɾ : *** ) ira ko~u ʦi ramo~uɬ~ɮaj, ʦipaɬ~ɮəsaj ato~u kaaʦaŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mimiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak mato~u pararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kapaħ ato~u kajiŋ ato~u mipafaħfaħ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj a pisaɾisin no~u ʦikawasaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tataʡakaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i, mato~u paħərək patirəŋ to~u ɾo~umaʡ, ʦaaj kaəʦa ira ko~u pakəɾaŋ sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u paŋʦaħ, ɬ~ɮəŋ itini i fataʡan a saʡətaɾ ato~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~unini kaɾipaħakan a mifo~utiŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i , miɾiʡaɾaʦ ħan naŋra, ʦi mapatajaj ato~u ʦipaɬ~ɮəsaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾəpo~un ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u pakəɾaŋ ħan naŋra, o~unini to~usaaj a ɬ~ɮəmak to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾəpo~un to~u ɬ~ɮəmak awaaj to~u ko~u ɾisin sanaj, o~u no~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj to~u ko~u ʡo~urip. o~urasaka, o~u pakəɾaŋ mifo~utiŋ ħananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak i, o~u pipafaħfaħ to~u tatiʡiħaj i tatirəŋan a ɾisin ko~uni, o~unian ko~uja masaro~umaaj a pinaŋan no~u paŋʦaħ. no~u mifo~utiŋ sato~u, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u fo~utiŋ ko~u aaɾaən ʦaaj ka saan, i nano~umaj makaənaj ħo~u maŋaaj to~u maaɾa, to~u ɾaɬ~ɮaj anʦa o~u ro~uma ko~u ɾisin no~u mawmaħaj, maaħərək to~u ko~u pisaɾisin to~u maso~ufo~uʦ, pararamo~uɬ~ɮ, mitaɬ~ɮəm, maŋaaj to~u pakəɾaŋ a mifo~utiŋ, o~uninian a ɬ~ɮəmak i, ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u faʡinajan ko~u mamikapo~ut, o~u fafaħijan itira to~u i ɾo~umaʡ miħaɾaka to~u kakaənən. o~uno~u nijaro~uʡ to~u a pisaɾisin, misakapo~uɾo~uo~uŋan to~u ko~u pifo~utiŋ, mato~u miɾaɬ~ɮis ko~u saʡamisan a ʡətaɾ a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, no~u pasawaɾi i misaʦəpo~uʡ, no~u faɾaŋaw i mikəsiʡ, no~u siwko~uɾan i miko~umo~uris, o~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak i, o~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~una siwko~uɾaŋ a taħo~uɾiʦan a mapataɾaħəkaɾ ko~uni mifo~utiŋaj a ɾisin no~u səraŋawan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u pakəɾaŋ ħananaj i, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮaj ato~u ɾiʡaɾaʦ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u pakəɾaŋ, nikawrira, o~u saki no~u mapatajaj ko~u pakəɾaŋ ħananaj. ano~u maħərək ko~u pitaɬ~ɮəm i, mipakəɾaŋ to~u sapaɾafi to~u mato~uʡasaj no~u maɾininaaj ato~u paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ a miħino~um to~u raro~um no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u maɾininaaj a maʔmin. saka, o~u ħərək no~u pitaɬ~ɮəm to~u mapatajaj i, ʦaaj ka ʔʦa o~u mamipakəɾaŋ a taɾa ʡaɾo~u ano~u ʔʦa i rijar a mifo~utiŋ to~u sapakaɾafi to~u mato~uʡasaj no~u ŋaŋasawan ato~u iraaj a miħajo~umaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u maħaənaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u mipakəɾaŋ ħananaj. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw ***,****," .
